query: SELECT id, name, especialidade, miniCurriculo IS NOT NULL as has_miniCurriculo, LENGTH(miniCurriculo) as miniCurriculo_len, photoUrl IS NOT NULL as has_photo FROM consultors WHERE role = 'mentor' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT id, name, especialidade, miniCurriculo IS NOT NULL as has_miniCurriculo, LENGTH(miniCurriculo) as miniCurriculo_len, photoUrl IS NOT NULL as has_photo FROM consultors WHERE role = 'mentor' ORDER BY name;
